title: crucianella gilanica var. glauca
intro: Crucianella gilanica var. glauca, also known as a variety of the Persian bugloss, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and congestion, as well as acting as an antispasmodic to ease coughs and relieve sinus pressure. Traditionally, Crucianella gilanica var. glauca is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
